title: Why We Cannot See Krishna Though He Is Everywhere #krishna #harekrishna #krishnaconsciousness
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: The Supreme Personality of Godhead who is Sachidananda Vigraha is not conceivable by the
material senses. That means with our existing senses we cannot perceive the Supreme Lord's
existence or presence. So Krishna, he decides to come in his original form but that which can be
seen by our eyes. All forms of Krishna are transcendental and spiritual. So Prabhupada,
he explains. For example, our language example we have heard many times. In this room,
Wi-Fi is everywhere. There is a HKM Wi-Fi or some name will be there. So there is a Wi-Fi
everywhere. But then why you need a mobile? Why you need a mobile? In the Wi-Fi only you see
YouTube. All the videos are already flowing in this Wi-Fi. All the pictures also flying here.
Why don't you see? The problem is, it's not that they are not there but our eyes cannot see. For
our eyes to see, already the...
YouTube videos which are going on there, you need this piece of mobile. Similarly, God is there
everywhere. That is the vision of a pure devotee. He sees the reality. Pure devotee, he sees Krishna
